query: SELECT DISTINCT MONTH(dataReferencia) as mes, YEAR(dataReferencia) as ano, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM arquivos WHERE convenioId = 1 AND dataReferencia IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MONTH(dataReferencia), YEAR(dataReferencia) ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT DISTINCT MONTH(dataReferencia) as mes, YEAR(dataReferencia) as ano, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM arquivos WHERE convenioId = 1 AND dataReferencia IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MONTH(dataReferencia), YEAR(dataReferencia) ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC;
